title: SICE: Central American Integration System - SIECA
text:
Legal Framework of Central American Integration 

















 Charts of the ODECA 
 and related protocols *

 Source: 
 Secretaría de Integración Económica Centroamericana 







 * Members : Belize, Costa Rica, 
 Dominican Republic (as Associated State), El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras, Nicaragua and Panama. 


 **Comprised of: Costa Rica, 
 El Salvador, Guatemala, Honduras and Nicaragua.
